title: Buttondown vs Customer.io (2025): Which Is Better?
meta_description: Buttondown vs Customer.io: compare pricing, features, and real use cases to find the right email tool.
intro: Choosing between Buttondown and Customer.io comes down to your specific use case. Buttondown is built for developers and technical writers who prefer markdown, while Customer.io targets product and growth teams sending behaviour-triggered messages.

comparison_table.tool_a: Developers And Technical Writers Who Prefer Markdown
comparison_table.tool_b: Product And Growth Teams Sending Behaviour-Triggered Messages

choose_a_if: You are primarily focused on developers and technical writers who prefer markdown
choose_b_if: You are primarily focused on product and growth teams sending behaviour-triggered messages

faq.a: It depends on your use case. Buttondown wins for developers and technical writers who prefer markdown, while Customer.io is stronger for product and growth teams sending behaviour-triggered messages.

faq.q: Which is cheaper, Buttondown or Customer.io?
faq.a: Buttondown starts at a lower price point. Pricing scales with subscriber count so total cost depends on your list size.

faq.q: Can I switch from Customer.io to Buttondown?
faq.a: Yes, switching is possible. Most platforms support CSV import/export. Plan time to recreate automations and templates.
